entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop [Pennisetum glaucum] studied for resistance to ergot

entities.name: ERGOT
entities.description: A fungal disease caused by Claviceps fusiformis

entities.name: CLAVICEPS FUSIFORMIS
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes ergot in pearl millet

entities.name: ERGOT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of pearl millet cultivars to resist ergot infection

entities.name: PROTOGYNY
entities.description: The condition where the female reproductive organ matures before the male organ

entities.name: TIME BETWEEN FULL PROTOGYNY AND ANTHESIS INITIATION
entities.description: The duration between full protogyny and the start of anthesis

entities.name: STIGMA LENGTH
entities.description: The length of the stigma in pearl millet

entities.name: SEED SET
entities.description: The proportion of ovules that develop into seeds

entities.name: LATENT PERIOD
entities.description: The time between infection and the start of sporulation

entities.name: SPORULATION PERIOD
entities.description: The duration of spore production by the pathogen

entities.name: ERGOT SEVERITY
entities.description: The extent of ergot disease symptoms in the plant

entities.name: CONIDIA PRODUCTION
entities.description: The number of conidia produced by the pathogen

entities.name: SCLEROTIA PRODUCTION
entities.description: The number of sclerotia produced by the pathogen

entities.name: ERGOT EPIDEMIOLOGY
entities.description: The study of the factors affecting the distribution and spread of ergot

entities.name: ERGOT MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Strategies and practices used to control ergot disease
